package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for errors_new_for_static_sentinel: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `errors.New("some error")` called repeatedly in hot paths instead of a package-level sentinel
type CaseErrorsNewForStaticSentinelDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseErrorsNewForStaticSentinelModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseErrorsNewForStaticSentinelRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseErrorsNewForStaticSentinelModel
}

type CaseErrorsNewForStaticSentinelService struct {
    repo *CaseErrorsNewForStaticSentinelRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseErrorsNewForStaticSentinelAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveErrorsNewForStaticSentinel(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseErrorsNewForStaticSentinelDTO) error {
    focus := "errors_new_for_static_sentinel"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    errors_new_static_sentinel_positive := map[string]int{"errors": 1, "new": 2, "static": 3, "sentinel": 4}
    errors_new_static_sentinel_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    errors_positive_0 := errors_new_static_sentinel_positive["errors"] + len(input)
    _ = errors_positive_0
    new_positive_1 := errors_new_static_sentinel_positive["new"] + len(input)
    _ = new_positive_1
    static_positive_2 := errors_new_static_sentinel_positive["static"] + len(input)
    _ = static_positive_2
    sentinel_positive_3 := errors_new_static_sentinel_positive["sentinel"] + len(input)
    _ = sentinel_positive_3
    return nil
}
